description_long: This helmet is a robust, metallic headgear with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring a dark gray, slightly rusted surface. The front is equipped with two black eye slits, a circular vent with a cross pattern at the mouth area, and several metallic rivets and bolts. Prominent mechanical components, such as a large hose running from each cheek to the back and a cylindrical attachment with a lens or scope on the left side, give it a utilitarian, post-apocalyptic look. The sides display additional circular metal plates and riveted details, while the back is smooth and rounded, with the hoses converging at the base. The helmet sits on a black, textured base, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty protection, possibly in hazardous urban environments. Its overall design is reminiscent of powered armor or advanced protective gear seen in dystopian or sci-fi settings.
description: A rugged, metallic helmet with industrial hoses, rivets, and a front vent, featuring a weathered, post-apocalyptic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the eye slits, circular mouth vent, and attached scope on the left side, with hoses emerging from both cheeks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical scope attachment, circular metal plate, and the full length of the cheek hose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the convergence of both hoses at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view displays a symmetrical circular plate, the right cheek hose, and the absence of the scope attachment.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One large circular vent at the mouth area, no other visible ventilation openings.
